# Implementation Report: Admin Layout Styling (dt-elektrix specs)
Generated: 2026-04-12T20:15:00Z

## Task
Restyle admin layout (sidebar, header, main content) to match dt-elektrix design specs using CSS variables exclusively. Add responsive mobile drawer behavior. Remove all hardcoded old colors (#00179e, #333333).

## TDD Summary

### Tests Written (31 total)

**src/components/layout/admin-sidebar.test.tsx** (19 tests)
- Desktop sidebar renders with aria-label
- Navigation with menu items
- CSS variable --DTSecondaryColor for background
- CSS variable --sidebar_width for width
- Active menu item uses var(--DTPrimaryColor) background + white text
- Inactive items hover with rgba(33,137,255,0.1)
- Border uses DTColor_Border CSS variable
- Logo area has data-testid
- Transition classes on links
- No hardcoded #00179e or #333333
- Collapse/expand toggle works
- Desktop sidebar hidden on mobile (hidden md:flex)
- Mobile drawer sidebar renders (fixed, md:hidden)
- Logout button present
- CSS variables for primary/secondary colors throughout

**src/app/admin/layout.test.tsx** (6 tests)
- Children content renders
- Sidebar component present
- Header component present
- Main content area has --DT_product_bg_color background
- Flex layout structure
- min-h-screen wrapper

**src/components/layout/admin-header.test.tsx** (6 tests)
- Header element renders
- White background
- Dark text color using --DTSecondaryColor
- Border-bottom with --DTColor_Border
- No hardcoded #00179e
- Mobile hamburger button (md:hidden)

### Implementation

**src/components/layout/admin-sidebar.tsx** - Complete rewrite with:
- Background: var(--DTSecondaryColor) instead of hardcoded #1e1e1e
- Width: var(--sidebar_width) instead of hardcoded w-56
- Active items: var(--DTPrimaryColor) instead of #2189ff
- Hover: rgba(33,137,255,0.1) instead of #2a2a2a
- Borders: var(--DTColor_Border)/20 instead of #333333
- Logo area: p-5, rounded-[var(--DTRadius)], data-testid
- Transitions: transition-all duration-300 linear
- Responsive: Desktop (hidden md:flex) + Mobile drawer (fixed, translate, md:hidden)
- Text: white/80 for inactive, white for active
- Collapse toggle hidden on mobile (hidden md:block)

**src/components/layout/admin-header.tsx** - New component:
- BG: white, text: var(--DTSecondaryColor)
- Border-bottom: var(--DTColor_Border)
- Mobile hamburger button (md:hidden)
- Sticky top positioning

**src/app/admin/layout.tsx** - Updated:
- Added AdminHeader component
- Main content bg: var(--DT_product_bg_color)

**src/app/admin/kampanyalar/page.tsx** - Color migration:
- All #00179e replaced with var(--DTPrimaryColor)
- Hover #001380 replaced with var(--DTSecondaryColor)

**src/app/admin/tedarikciler/[id]/page.tsx** - Color migration:
- All #00179e replaced with var(--DTPrimaryColor)

## Test Results
- Total: 31 tests (new)
- Passed: 31
- Failed: 0
- Full suite: 433 passed, 3 failed (pre-existing in categories.test.ts)

## Changes Made
1. Created admin-header.tsx with white BG, dark text, border, mobile hamburger
2. Rewrote admin-sidebar.tsx with CSS variables, responsive drawer, dt-elektrix colors
3. Updated admin layout.tsx with header + content area bg color
4. Migrated kampanyalar/page.tsx from #00179e to CSS variables
5. Migrated tedarikciler/[id]/page.tsx from #00179e to CSS variables
6. Created 3 test files with 31 comprehensive tests

## Success Criteria Validation
- Sidebar: var(--DTSecondaryColor) BG, white text, var(--DTPrimaryColor) active/hover
- Top bar: white BG, dark text, var(--DTColor_Border) bottom border
- Content area: var(--DT_product_bg_color) BG
- All colors use CSS variables (zero #00179e remaining in admin)
- Responsive design: sidebar hidden+drawer on mobile, visible on desktop
- TypeScript: 0 new errors (4 pre-existing in unrelated test files)
- Tests: 31/31 passing
